ques: Review yesterday's NHL game results on ESPN, focusing on teams' performance.
answer: ESPN's NHL scoreboard is anchored to Sun Sep 20, 2026 (preseason); the date-navigation/cached data wouldn't surface completed prior-day results. All listed games (Jets@Oilers, Golden Knights@Kings, Canucks@Kraken, Islanders@Devils, Sharks@Ducks, Capitals@Bruins, Avalanche@Utah) are scheduled preseason matchups with no final scores — every team is 0-0, so there were no completed game results or team performance stats to review.
